hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$root" ] && exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; bunx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.mjs|*.cjs) bunx eslint --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; exit 0
